description:
Load sperm whale myoglobin (PDB: 1A6M) into PyMOL, compute the solvent-accessible surface area (SASA) for the protein polymer atoms (excluding the heme cofactor and water molecules), and color the structure by SASA values using a color spectrum. Save a high-resolution publication figure to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/myoglobin_sasa.png. Additionally, write a plain-text report to ~/PyMOL_Data/myoglobin_sasa_report.txt containing:
1. The total protein SASA in Angstroms squared (polymer atoms only).
2. A list of the 10 most buried residues (lowest per-residue SASA), including residue number, residue name, and SASA value.
3. Identification of which of those buried residues are hydrophobic.
